meta.title: About
meta.description: Background across operations and software, now focused on building AI workflows and agentic automation systems that hold up in real use.

summary.body: I build practical AI-assisted systems that help teams move faster with less ambiguity. My focus is agentic workflow design, automation, and internal tooling that connects planning, execution, and traceability. I care about systems that are explainable, reviewable, and usable under day-to-day pressure.

story: I started in operations leadership, where reliability depended on workflow design more than heroics. I led teams, coordinated logistics, and managed high-variance environments where dropped handoffs created immediate problems. That work built my instincts around structure, visibility, and closing feedback loops.

As I moved into software, I kept the same operating model: define intent, make state visible, and reduce friction between planning and execution. I began by building workflow automations and internal reporting tools, then expanded into full-stack products and AI-enabled systems.

Recent work centers on Dev Toolbox 2.0 and Toolbox GPT, where I integrated Codex, Gemini CLI, and Claude into a contract-driven workflow assistant. The goal was straightforward: ship useful internal systems that support rapid iteration while keeping side effects controlled and decisions traceable.
howIWork: I design systems, not one-off prompts. Prompting is part of the interface, but reliability comes from contracts, state management, and explicit control points.
I use preview -> apply gating for side-effectful operations so plans can be reviewed before execution.
I build around probe-fix-probe loops, deterministic runs where needed, and structured traces so outputs can be verified and improved over time.

skills.systemsAndOperations: Workflow architecture; process clarity; operational reliability; translating ambiguous needs into explicit execution paths.
skills.leadershipAndPeople: Builder/operator mindset; cross-functional coordination; clear handoffs; calm execution in changing environments.
skills.softwareAndArchitecture: Full-stack delivery (React, TypeScript, Supabase/Postgres); API and webhook integrations; file-oriented context systems; audit-friendly logging and traces.
skills.conceptualAndStrategic: Agentic workflow design; contract-driven planning (preview/apply); role-based addressee patterns; iterative experimentation across AI model providers.

values: Clarity - If a system cannot explain what happened and why, it is hard to trust.
Practicality - Build what teams can actually use, not demos that collapse under real workflows.
Traceability - Keep decisions and actions inspectable so iteration is safer and faster.
Human-centered execution - Automation should reduce cognitive load and support better judgment.
auroraOriginSafe: Aurora began as an exploration of conversational software development and intent-first system design.
It remains a conceptual track that informs how I think about agent behavior, explainability, and shared understanding between people and systems.
personalNotes: I enjoy turning messy, repetitive workflows into reliable systems people can trust.
I am most engaged in environments where fast experimentation and operational discipline are both valued.
